_meta.note: qpsk_symbols = per-varicode-bit K=5 convolutional code symbol s = parity(POLY1 & shreg) | (parity(POLY2 & shreg) << 1), s in 0..3, from fldigi's `encoder`. This is the bit-exact FEC domain (before the (4-s)&3 constellation remap in tx_carriers): omnimodem's ConvCode(k=5, polys=[0x17,0x19]).encode over the same varicode bitstream, paired s_i = out[2i] | (out[2i+1]<<1), must reproduce it byte-for-byte over the payload (omnimodem additionally appends k-1 tail-flush symbols).
